name: MonkeyZoo: The Broken Signal
description: The Broken Signal is a MonkeyZoo comic about the message nobody was left to receive. In the Old Quarter — Zoo City's forgotten first draft — a FusionZoo relay has been repeating itself for thirteen years, and someone has been quietly keeping it alive. Static hears it first. Patch recognizes it and won't say how. Inside Relay 1, the squad finds the Pending: monkeys the early fusion experiments left between states, before the machines guaranteed all-or-nothing, still politely asking if it's done yet. There is no fix in this issue and no fight — just the harder thing, the visit, the promise to come back, and a crumpled recall notice left beside a heartbeat that answers with two beats where there used to be one. The signal was never calling for help. It was calling something back.

Flip This Comics: by Fiend Studios. Flip This Comics is a bold, comic-book-style educational series created by Fiend Studios to onboard and empower new users in the Chia blockchain ecosystem. Each issue breaks down complex concepts - like NFTs, CATs, farming, offers, and decentralized data - in a visually engaging, story-driven way. Through dynamic art, clever humor, and approachable storytelling, Flip This Comics transforms blockchain learning into something fun, collectible, and easy to follow. Each comic doubles as both a guide and a collectible, designed to help newcomers and veterans alike understand the tools, culture, and creativity thriving within Chia. Utility & Purpose: Educational resources presented as serialized comics. Explains blockchain, minting, and decentralized concepts in plain language. Bridges art and accessibility - built to entertain while teaching. Connects directly to real projects and creators within the Chia community.
